_comment: Whitelist for gate_hero_integrity.py's wrong-subject detector. A non-generic hero shared across >1 fiche FAILS the build unless its key is listed here. Key = the hero_image value (local /img/... path or http URL) OR its Wikimedia Commons filename (spaces, no 'File:' prefix). Adding a key is Eddie's explicit sign-off that the shared reuse is legitimate (e.g. same massif). Empty by default: nothing shared is auto-allowed.
